Operations: Ramp Forecast v1 (standalone)

Operations Hub Pipeline Shifts Turf Ramp Forecast-only page. No FPE capacity override in this step.

Forecast Controls

Deterministic stage-conversion and stage-duration model.

Editable per-transition conversion and expected duration.
